results.output:
Port0:
show config interfaces ge100-0/0/26/0 urpf | no-more

# NCP3-nog config-start [13-Apr-2026 04:51:27 UTC]

interfaces
  ge100-0/0/26/0
    urpf
      admin-state enabled
      allow-default disabled
      mode strict
      address-family ipv4
        admin-state enabled
        mode strict
      !
      address-family ipv6
        admin-state enabled
        mode loose
      !
    !
  !
!

# NCP3-nog config-end

NCP3-nog#

      allow-default disabled
      mode loose
    !
  !
!

results.expected: Two breakout ports from same parent have independent uRPF modes

results.step: Step 5b: show interfaces confirms independent modes
results.expected: port0 shows Mode: strict, port1 shows Mode: loose
results.analysis: port0 strict in show=Yes, port1 loose in show=Yes
